description: Search Obsidian vaults with hybrid full-text, fuzzy, semantic, and graph retrieval.
name: io.github.flowing-abyss/obsidian-hybrid-search

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault to index and search.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional prefix for MCP tool names when configuring multiple vaults.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_PREFIX

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated glob patterns to exclude from indexing.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_IGNORE_PATTERNS

environmentVariables.description: Optional API key for OpenAI-compatible remote embeddings; omit to use local embeddings.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible API base URL for OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, or similar providers.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Remote embedding model name when using an OpenAI-compatible API.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Local embedding model used when no remote embedding API is configured.
environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional ONNX cross-encoder reranker model used when reranking is requested.
environmentVariables.name: RERANKER_MODEL

title: Obsidian Hybrid Search
